title: Portfolio Website
description: A fully responsive personal portfolio with dark/light mode, particle animations, and Framer Motion interactions.
problem: Needed a professional online presence to showcase skills and attract internship opportunities.
action: Designed and built from scratch using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion with a custom theme system.
result: Live portfolio deployed on Vercel with smooth animations and full mobile responsiveness.

title: MERN Task Manager
description: A full-stack task management app with authentication and real-time updates.
problem: Wanted hands-on experience building a complete MERN stack application.
action: Building the backend with Express and MongoDB, frontend with React, currently implementing JWT auth.
result: In active development — backend API routes are complete, frontend in progress.

title: Campus Connect
description: A planned college community platform for event updates and peer networking.
problem: Students at KPRCAS lack a centralized place for event info and peer collaboration.
action: Planning phase — designing the data model and UI wireframes.
